title: update_page
description: Update properties, icon, cover, or archived status of an existing Notion page. Does not modify page content blocks (use manage_blocks for that).

page_id.description: UUID of the page to update

properties.description: Properties to update (key = property name, value = property value object per Notion API format)

cover_url.description: Updated cover image URL (set to null to remove)

archived.description: Set to true to archive the page, false to restore
